_about: Seed manifest of public-domain / Creative-Commons aviation imagery
for the Brief cover-image picker + Upload-page hero gallery.
- US Government works (DOD / NASA / USDA) are public domain by
17 USC §105 — safe to redistribute. Source URL must trace back
- Wikimedia Commons entries must be CC0 or US-Gov-PD. Skip any
'fair use' or 'screenshot' tags — we lose redistribution.
- Each entry MUST cite a source URL so the next pair of eyes can
URLs not yet baked in — populate this file with verified entries.
The frontend silently hides broken thumbnails so a partial manifest
won't crash anything; just shows fewer tiles.
